name: MapLibre Native FFI shared C++ sccache proof

tool.measured_command:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
export MISE_ENV="${MISE_ENV:-linux-x64-vulkan}"
export SCCACHE_BASEDIRS="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}"
export SCCACHE_GHA_VERSION="${SCCACHE_GHA_VERSION:-${MISE_ENV%-*}}"
export CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache
export CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache
mise run configure
mise run build
tool.notes: MapLibre Native FFI issue 7 asks for shared C++ sccache with main-only writes and public or anonymous reads. This first proof intentionally starts with the Linux x64 Vulkan variant used by upstream CI, preserving MISE_ENV, SCCACHE_BASEDIRS, SCCACHE_GHA_VERSION, and CMake compiler-launcher wiring from .github/actions/setup-ci-deps. Promotion requires the BoringCache read-only lane to reuse compiler artifacts without BORINGCACHE_SAVE_TOKEN; a writer-only warm run is not a sales proof.
